pve_actions.name: Hakaze
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 200.
Additional Effect: Increases Kenki Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Jinpu
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 140.
Combo Action: Gyofu
Combo Potency: 300
Combo Bonus: Grants Fugetsu
Fugetsu Effect: Increases damage dealt by 13%
Duration: 40s
Combo Bonus: Increases Kenki Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Third Eye
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces the amount of damage taken by the next attack by 10%.
Duration: 4s
Additional Effect: Increases Kenki Gauge by 10 when hit

pve_actions.name: Enpi
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a ranged attack with a potency of 100.
Enhanced Enpi Potency: 270
Additional Effect: Increases Kenki Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Shifu
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 140.
Combo Action: Gyofu
Combo Potency: 300
Combo Bonus: Grants Fuka
Fuka Effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 13%
Duration: 40s
Combo Bonus: Increases Kenki Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Fuga
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 90 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: Increases Kenki Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Gekko
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 160.
210 when executed from a target's rear.
Combo Action: Jinpu
Combo Potency: 370
Rear Combo Potency: 420
Combo Bonus: Increases Kenki Gauge by 10
Combo Bonus: Grants Getsu

pve_actions.name: Iaijutsu
pve_actions.effect:
Executes a weaponskill depending on current number of Sen stored in Sen Gauge.
1 Sen: Higanbana
2 Sen: Tenka Goken
3 Sen: Midare Setsugekka
While under the effect of Tendo, Tenka Goken changes to Tendo Goken, and Midare Setsugekka changes to Tendo Setsugekka.

pve_actions.name: Mangetsu
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Combo Action: Fuko
Combo Potency: 120
Combo Bonus: Grants Fugetsu
Fugetsu Effect: Increases damage dealt by 13%
Duration: 40s
Combo Bonus: Increases Kenki Gauge by 10
Combo Bonus: Grants Getsu

pve_actions.name: Kasha
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 160.
210 when executed from a target's flank.
Combo Action: Shifu
Combo Potency: 370
Flank Combo Potency: 420
Combo Bonus: Increases Kenki Gauge by 10
Combo Bonus: Grants Ka

pve_actions.name: Oka
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Combo Action: Fuko
Combo Potency: 120
Combo Bonus: Grants Fuka
Fuka Effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 13%
Duration: 40s
Combo Bonus: Increases Kenki Gauge by 10
Combo Bonus: Grants Ka

pve_actions.name: Yukikaze
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 160.
Combo Action: Gyofu
Combo Potency: 340
Combo Bonus: Increases Kenki Gauge by 15
Combo Bonus: Grants Setsu

pve_actions.name: Meikyo Shisui
pve_actions.effect:
Execute up to 3 weaponskill combos without meeting combo prerequisites. Does not affect Iaijutsu or Ogi Namikiri.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Successfully landing Gekko grants Fugetsu, and successfully landing Kasha grants Fuka
Additional Effect: Grants Tendo
Duration: 30s
Maximum Charges: 2

pve_actions.name: Hissatsu: Shinten
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 250.
Kenki Gauge Cost: 25

pve_actions.name: Hissatsu: Gyoten
pve_actions.effect:
Rushes target and delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Kenki Gauge Cost: 10
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Hissatsu: Yaten
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Additional Effect: 10-yalm backstep
Additional Effect: Grants Enhanced Enpi
Duration: 15s
Kenki Gauge Cost: 10
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Meditate
pve_actions.effect:
Gradually increases your Kenki Gauge.
Duration: 15s
Additional Effect: Grants stacks of Meditation when used in combat, up to a maximum of 3
Kenki Gauge not affected when used outside battle.
Effect ends upon using another action or moving (including facing a different direction).
Cancels auto-attack upon execution.
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills upon execution. Cannot be executed during the cooldown of weaponskills.

pve_actions.name: Hissatsu: Kyuten
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Kenki Gauge Cost: 25

pve_actions.name: Hagakure
pve_actions.effect: Converts Setsu, Getsu, and Ka into Kenki. Each Sen converted increases your Kenki Gauge by 10. Can only be executed if under the effect of at least one of the three statuses.

pve_actions.name: Ikishoten
pve_actions.effect:
Increases Kenki Gauge by 50.
Additional Effect: Grants Ogi Namikiri Ready
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Zanshin Ready
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while in combat.

pve_actions.name: Hissatsu: Guren
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 400.
Kenki Gauge Cost: 25
Shares a recast timer with Hissatsu: Senei.

pve_actions.name: Hissatsu: Senei
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 800.
Kenki Gauge Cost: 25
Shares a recast timer with Hissatsu: Guren.

pve_actions.name: Tsubame-gaeshi
pve_actions.effect:
Repeats the previously executed iaijutsu.
Cannot be used to repeat Higanbana.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Tsubame-gaeshi Ready.

pve_actions.name: Shoha
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 640 for the first enemy, and 40% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed after accumulating three stacks of Meditation by executing Iaijutsu, Meditate, or Ogi Namikiri while in combat.
Consumes all stacks of Meditation upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Tengentsu
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces the amount of damage taken by the next attack by 10%.
Duration: 4s
Additional Effect: Grants Tengentsu's Foresight and increases Kenki Gauge by 10 when hit
Tengentsu's Foresight Effect: Gradually restores your HP and reduces damage taken by 10%
Duration: 9s
Cure Potency: 200

pve_actions.name: Fuko
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Increases Kenki Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Ogi Namikiri
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a critical hit to all enemies in a cone before you with a potency of 1,000 for the first enemy, and 40% less for all remaining enemies.
Damage dealt is increased when under an effect that raises critical hit rate.
Grants a stack of Meditation, up to a maximum of 3.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Ogi Namikiri Ready.

pve_actions.name: Kaeshi: Namikiri
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a critical hit to all enemies in a cone before you with a potency of 1,000 for the first enemy, and 40% less for all remaining enemies.
Damage dealt is increased when under an effect that raises critical hit rate.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Ogi Namikiri changes to Kaeshi: Namikiri when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Gyofu
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 240.
Additional Effect: Increases Kenki Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Zanshin
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to all enemies in a cone before you with a potency of 940 for the first enemy, and 40% less for all remaining enemies.
Kenki Gauge Cost: 50
Can only be executed while under the effect of Zanshin Ready.

pve_actions.name: Higanbana
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 200.
Additional Effect: Damage over time
Potency: 50
Duration: 60s
Additional Effect: Grants a stack of Meditation, up to a maximum of 3
Can only be executed after accumulating 1 Sen.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Iaijutsu changes to Higanbana when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Tenka Goken
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Tsubame-gaeshi Ready
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants a stack of Meditation, up to a maximum of 3
Can only be executed after accumulating 2 Sen.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Iaijutsu changes to Tenka Goken when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Midare Setsugekka
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a critical hit with a potency of 680.
Damage dealt is increased when under an effect that raises critical hit rate.
Additional Effect: Grants Tsubame-gaeshi Ready
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants a stack of Meditation, up to a maximum of 3
Can only be executed after accumulating 3 Sen.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Iaijutsu changes to Midare Setsugekka when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Kaeshi: Goken
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300 to all nearby enemies.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Tsubame-gaeshi changes to Kaeshi: Goken when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Kaeshi: Setsugekka
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a critical hit with a potency of 680.
Damage dealt is increased when under an effect that raises critical hit rate.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Tsubame-gaeshi changes to Kaeshi: Setsugekka when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Tendo Goken
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 410 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Tsubame-gaeshi Ready
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants a stack of Meditation, up to a maximum of 3
Can only be executed while under the effect of Tendo, and after accumulating 2 Sen.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Iaijutsu changes to Tendo Goken when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Tendo Setsugekka
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a critical hit with a potency of 1,100.
Damage dealt is increased when under an effect that raises critical hit rate.
Additional Effect: Grants Tsubame-gaeshi Ready
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants a stack of Meditation, up to a maximum of 3
Can only be executed while under the effect of Tendo, and after accumulating 3 Sen.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Iaijutsu changes to Tendo Setsugekka when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Tendo Kaeshi Goken
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 410 to all nearby enemies.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Tsubame-gaeshi changes to Tendo Kaeshi Goken when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a critical hit with a potency of 1,100.
Damage dealt is increased when under an effect that raises critical hit rate.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Tsubame-gaeshi changes to Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka when requirements for execution are met.

traits.name: Second Wind
traits.effect: Ability

traits.name: Leg Sweep
traits.effect: Ability

traits.name: Bloodbath
traits.effect: Ability

traits.name: Feint
traits.effect: Ability

traits.name: Arm's Length
traits.effect: Ability

traits.name: True North
traits.effect: Ability

traits.name: Kenki Mastery
traits.effect: Increases Kenki Gauge when landing select weaponskills or when taking damage while under the effect of Third Eye.

traits.name: Kenki Mastery II
traits.effect: Increases Kenki Gauge when landing all weaponskills excluding Iaijutsu.

traits.name: Way of the Samurai
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Hakaze to 200, Jinpu to 120, and Shifu to 120.

traits.name: Enhanced Iaijutsu
traits.effect:
Reduces Iaijutsu cast time to 1.3 seconds.
Also grants Tsubame-gaeshi Ready after executing iaijutsu excluding Higanbana.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Meikyo Shisui
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Meikyo Shisui.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Enhanced Fugetsu and Fuka
traits.effect: Improves Fugetsu's damage increase to 13% and Fuka's reduction to weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay to 13%.

traits.name: Third Eye Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Third Eye to Tengentsu.

traits.name: Way of the Samurai II
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Gekko, Kasha, and Yukikaze to 110.

traits.name: Fuga Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Fuga to Fuko.

traits.name: Enhanced Ikishoten
traits.effect:
Grants Ogi Namikiri Ready upon execution of Ikishoten.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Hakaze Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Hakaze to Gyofu.

traits.name: Enhanced Hissatsu
traits.effect: Reduces Hissatsu: Guren and Hissatsu: Senei recast time to 60 seconds.

traits.name: Way of the Samurai III
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Jinpu to 140, Shifu to 140, Enhanced Enpi to 270, Gekko to 160, Higanbana damage over time to 50, Kasha to 160, Yukikaze to 160, Midare Setsugekka to 680, Kaeshi: Setsugekka to 680, Shoha to 640, Ogi Namikiri to 1,000, and Kaeshi: Namikiri to 1,000.

traits.name: Enhanced Ikishoten II
traits.effect:
Grants Zanshin Ready upon executing Ikishoten.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Meikyo Shisui II
traits.effect:
Grants Tendo upon executing Meikyo Shisui.
Duration: 30s
Tenka Goken changes to Tendo Goken and Midare Setsugekka changes to Tendo Setsugekka while under the effect of Tendo.
